title: Grilled American Cheese Toast
description: A simple, comforting sandwich made with melted cheese, toasted bread, and a hint of crunch from the peppers.

ingredients.name: bread (white or whole wheat)
ingredients.notes: preferably day-old bread for crispiest results

ingredients.name: garnish
ingredients.notes: such as lettuce, tomato, or pickles

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of each slice of bread.
Place one slice of bread, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Top with a slice of American cheese, a few slices of peppers, and another slice of bread, buttered side up.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Flip the sandwich over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
Serve immediately and garnish with your choice of toppings, if desired.
